Container.Name: Seshat
Container.Overview:
Seshat is a self-hosted book discovery and acquisition platform. It scans your Calibre library against multiple metadata sources, searches a private tracker for missing titles, and automates the full pipeline from IRC announce monitoring through torrent management, metadata enrichment, and Calibre delivery — all from a single unified interface.
Discovery: Sync Calibre libraries, scan 7 metadata sources (Goodreads, Hardcover, Kobo, Amazon, IBDB, Google Books, MAM), manage authors and series, find missing books.
Pipeline: IRC announce monitoring, author-based filtering, VIP/freeleech/wedge/ratio policy engine, snatch budget management, mandatory review queue with cover images, multi-client support (qBittorrent, Transmission, Deluge, rTorrent), CWA/Calibre/folder delivery sinks.
All credentials are entered through the web UI after first boot — no secrets in environment variables.
Container.Description: Self-hosted book discovery and acquisition platform. Scans Calibre libraries, searches MAM for missing titles, monitors IRC for new books, downloads via your torrent client, enriches metadata from 7 sources, and delivers to Calibre after review.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Seshat web interface. Default 8789.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Seshat's databases (seshat.db, seshat_auth.db), settings.json, auth_secret, and the encrypted credential store. Survives container restarts and image updates.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Shared volume with your torrent client's download directory. Seshat reads completed book files from here for the post-download pipeline. Must be the same physical directory your torrent client saves to (path translation settings handle namespace differences between containers).

Config.Name: CWA Ingest Folder
Config.Description: Calibre-Web-Automated's watched ingest directory. Approved books are dropped here for auto-import into Calibre. Only needed if using CWA as the default sink.

Config.Name: Calibre Library
Config.Description: Path to your Calibre library directory (the folder containing metadata.db). Used by the Discovery domain for library sync and by the Pipeline for direct Calibre sink delivery.

Config.Name: Review Staging
Config.Description: Directory where patched book files are parked while awaiting your review approval. Each pending review gets its own subfolder.

Config.Name: Staging
Config.Description: Temporary workspace for metadata extraction and patching before review.

Config.Name: WEBUI_PORT
Config.Description: Internal web UI port. Must match the container port in the Web UI Port mapping above.

Config.Name: Calibre Library Path
Config.Description: Path to the Calibre library root inside the container. Used for library discovery and sync.

Config.Name: Verbose Logging
Config.Description: Enable detailed debug logging on startup (true/false). Can also be toggled at runtime in the Settings UI.
